name: Calcolatore Deposito Termine
desc: Calcola Interest = Capital × (1 + Rate/n)^(n×t) - Capital. Esempio: €10,000 at 3.5% annual, 1 year, monthly compounding = Interest = €355.77; Total = €10,355.77....
description: Calcola Interest = Capital × (1 + Rate/n)^(n×t) - Capital. Esempio: €10,000 at 3.5% annual, 1 year, monthly compounding = Interest = €355.77; Total = €10,355.77....
seo_title: Calcolatore Deposito Termine – Passo dopo Passo
seo_description: Calcola Interest = Capital × (1 + Rate/n)^(n×t) - Capital. Esempio: €10,000 at 3.5% annual, 1 year, monthly compounding = Interest = €355.77; Total = €10,355.77
example_label: Calcolating return on €20,000 term deposit at 3.5% annual rate for 18 months.
result_context: The intereses of {intereses} is earned over the term. The totale of {totale} is returned at maturity.
steps: {'step': 2, 'description': 'Calcolate time fattore in years', 'calculation': '18 months ÷ 12 = 1.5 years'}
mistakes: Not checking early withdrawal penalties before investing
Confusing nominal rate with effective annual rate
Forgetting to compare with inflation for real returns
